attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ATO_LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.HEADER_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_NUMBER,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPPABLE_FLAG
 FROM 
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
WHERE CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND NCOU.MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG  = 'Y' 
aND CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE <> 'CONFIG'
AND CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
AND CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_ID  IN 
(
SELECT LINE_ID  FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL COOLA
WHERE COOLA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >=  CAST ('$$LastExtractDate'  AS TIMESTAMP(0))- INTERVAL '1' DAY 
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE'
GROUP  BY 1
UNION
SELECT SOURCE_LINE_ID FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS TMP
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= CAST ('$$LastExtractDate'  AS TIMESTAMP(0))- INTERVAL '1' DAY 
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE'
GROUP BY 1
union
SELECT SOURCE_LINE_ID FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS TMP
WHERE delivery_Detail_id in (select delivery_Detail_id from $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM 
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= CAST ('$$LastExtractDate'  AS TIMESTAMP(0))- INTERVAL '1' DAY 
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE'
group by 1)
)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_ID ORDER BY CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
